creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 226272
git diff for devel/safe-iop: adds LICENSE_NAME to quell pkg-fallout@

OK I waited as instructed. After the quarterly got cut, I
continued to get complaints from the package builders.
So today I checked out a copy of the ports tree and set
out to determine what was wrong. Apparently something was
different from the version of the ports tree I was using
and the one I checked out today. As the build DID complain
about the LICENSE block. I have fixed the complaint.
wanted;
LICENSE_NAME
which is provided in the attached git diff.
I am also providing the build log for proof/inspection.
This was performed on 13/amd64.

Thanks you! :-)

--Chris
